title: Thinking Different, Thinking Slowly: LLMs on a PowerPC Mac
abstract: Thinking Different, Thinking Slowly: LLMs on a PowerPC Mac is a general-purpose LLM that handles conversation, content generation, analysis, and code. It is the closest thing to a full-stack team m...
abstract_zh: Thinking Different, Thinking Slowly: LLMs on a PowerPC Mac 不是一般的AI模型。它能聊、能写、能分析、能编程，是一个真·全能选手。你跟它聊过就知道，这玩意儿比你半个团队还能打。
